request.description: These `params` control how the **Pages Jaunes Companies Search Export** crawler behaves — including pagination, contact harvesting, and detailed listing enrichment. ➡️ These parameters are specific to the **Pages Jaunes Companies Search Export** crawler. _Refer to the_ [Constructing the params Object](#13eb068f-2bae-4603-941e-9f36038fb379) _section to understand how to format and apply them._ | Parameter | Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | **max_pages** | integer | Maximum number of result pages to crawl (e.g., `3`). | | **functions.collect_contacts** | boolean | If `true`, visits each business’s website to collect publicly available email addresses. | | **functions.results_details** | boolean | If `true`, visits each listing’s detail page to collect structured data: `siret`, `naf_code`, `shop_size`, `shop_type`, `siren`, `company_hq`, `company_creation_date`, `company_size`, `website`, `facebook`, and `instagram`. | --- ### ⚠️ **Additional Notes** - Enabling `functions.collect_contacts` or `functions.results_details` will increase run time due to extra HTTP requests per listing.

response.name: Example

request.description:
These `result` objects are returned by the **Pages Jaunes Companies Search Export** crawler.

| **Field** | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **activity** | string | Search filter used (e.g., `"magasins d'électroménager +2"`). |
| **additional_phone** | string | Secondary phone number, if available. |
| **city** | string | City where the business is located. |
| **company_creation_date** | string (ISO) | Company’s founding date (`YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ`). |
| **company_hq** | string | Address of the company headquarters, if provided. |
| **company_size** | string | Company size category (e.g., `"5000 à 9999 salariés"`). |
| **description** | string | Business description text. |
| **email** | string | Contact email address, if collected. |
| **facebook** | string or null | Facebook page URL, if listed. |
| **full_address** | string | Complete street address (e.g., `"30 boulevard Capucines 75009 Paris"`). |
| **functions.results_details.filling_date** | string | Timestamp when detail-page enrichment ran (`DD/MM/YYYY, HH:mm:ss Z`). |
| **image_url** | string | URL of the business’s logo or main image. |
| **instagram** | string or null | Instagram profile URL, if listed. |
| **item_id** | string | Internal listing identifier. |
| **naf_code** | string | NAF activity code (e.g., `"4754Z"`). |
| **phone** | string | Primary phone number, if available. |
| **ratings** | integer | Number of customer ratings. |
| **score** | number | Average rating score (e.g., `1`). |
| **shop_size** | string | Shop size category (e.g., `"50 à 99 salariés"`). |
| **shop_type** | string | Establishment type (e.g., `"Etablissement secondaire"`). |
| **siren** | string | Company SIREN number. |
| **siret** | string | Company SIRET number. |
| **tags** | string | Comma-separated service tags (e.g., `"livraison à domicile, appareil de puériculture, …"`). |
| **title** | string | Business name or listing title (e.g., `"Boulanger Opéra"`). |
| **url** | string | Direct URL to the listing on Pages Jaunes. |
| **website** | string | Business website URL, if available. |
| **zip_code** | string | Postal code for the listing (e.g., `"75009"`). |

response.name: Example
